title: The Backrooms
description: Adds the backrooms as new dimensions for you to explore
body:
# Important Info
 **You enter through by jumping into the void in any dimension.**
 Creating a testing world is recommended to prevent corruption
 If you find a glow item frame item on the ground report it in the discord
 that is a broken exit and needs to be fixed
 [If you want to see my progress and plans click here.](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/19UCxJ6DPfZl2gkXVkyIKVShgLCrFJ33bIGpuFlLm03g/edit?gid=0#gid=0)
 
# What this adds:
This datapack adds The Backrooms which has alot of exploration content
This also adds advancements for every single thing in the backrooms

## Why should i use this?:
this adds more exploration content and prevents you from dying to The Void while still having a penalty for falling into The Void
### other info/bug reporting:
Glow Item Frames indicate an exit so look for those.
The bedrock floor is replaced with obsidian in every level so you can use that to get to back Level 0
The exit to the backrooms in level 0 being a long hallway with an exit at the end
The discord has a bug report channel so go there and there are books in every level explaining all information you need to know about that level
# **dont send your issue in general** and **install the resource pack**
